flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mesa Community College fell 22% between 2009 and 2010 (5.7% → 4.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mesa Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $9.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mesa Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.1k → $2.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mesa Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).
